episodes.title: AA's Biggest Lies Start Right Here. The Truth About Bill Wilson And The Big Book.
episodes.description: This video questions the authenticity of The Big Book used in Alcoholics Anonymous meetings, suggesting it contains falsehoods. We aim to expose the first lie presented in the book's initial chapters, drawing parallels to fundamentalist religious worldviews and challenging the traditional views of Alcoholics Anonymous addiction recovery. Many ask, " is AA a cult?" and this discussion contributes to that ongoing debate. BOOKS FOR RECOVERY AND REINVENTION THE SMALL BOOK: HOW I BEAT ALCOHOLISM AND WHY ALCOHOLICS ANONYMOUS DOESN'T WORK. THE SHEPHERD AND THE RUNNINGWOLF: A PATH TO FORGIVENESS ON THE PACIFIC CREST TRAIL REINVENTION OF SELF: HOW TO CHANGE YOUR LIFE AND BEING FOREVER

episodes.title: Ready To Be Sober Or Not Ready To Be Sober? How Do You Know When It's Time To Quit Drinking?
episodes.description: When should you know it is time to quit drinking? This was how I knew I had to stop drinking. BOOKS FOR RECOVERY AND REINVENTION THE SMALL BOOK: HOW I BEAT ALCOHOLISM AND WHY ALCOHOLICS ANONYMOUS DOESN'T WORK. episodes.title: AA Is A High Control Group? The Secret Dark Side Of AA Cult. What Defines AA As A Cult?
episodes.description: Are there signs that AA is controlling more than you realize? Is AA a high control group, which is a cult? The fact is, AA is control. The image of a cult. BOOKS FOR RECOVERY AND REINVENTION THE SMALL BOOK: HOW I BEAT ALCOHOLISM AND WHY ALCOHOLICS ANONYMOUS DOESN'T WORK. THE SHEPHERD AND THE RUNNINGWOLF: A PATH TO FORGIVENESS ON THE PACIFIC CREST TRAIL REINVENTION OF SELF: HOW TO CHANGE YOUR LIFE AND BEING FOREVER To listen to the deconstruction of two long time AA members who escaped the cult check out their channels below Quackoholics Anonymous https://www.youtube.com/@UCcj54GbpaeqNzy4s-nQRt4g Kirsten--Sobriety Bestie https://www.youtube.com/@UCWefB6bk8reofI7ZnXfPTNA The term John Barleycorn: taken from Jack London's work John Barleycorn, 1913
